title: Yousaf, Humza - First Minister of Scotland - ACOBA advice
body: "Rt Hon Humza Yousaf MSP left his role as First Minister in May 2024.  Strategic Advisor, Muslim Impact Forum Mr Yousaf sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with the Muslim Impact Forum. The letter containing the Committee’s advice about the conditions imposed was sent in October 2025; and the role was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Strategic Advisor, Ten in Ten Gigatonne Mr Yousaf sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Ten in Ten Gigatonne. The letter containing the Committee’s advice about the conditions imposed was sent in December 2024; and taken up later in January 2025. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Speaker, London Speakers’ Bureau  Mr Yousaf sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with London Speakers’ Bureau. The letter containing the Committee’s advice about the conditions imposed was sent in November 2024; and taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
